description: BSH All-in+ Kitchen Package pricing. Three tiers — Good / Better / Best — matching BSH's own product catalogue (Paket Leader / Profi / Top Feature). Otto must not quote prices outside these ranges.
source: All-in+ Business Solutions Produktsortiment (BSH internal deck, April 2026)

bundles.label: Leader Package
bundles.positioning: Fully equipped kitchen at an attractive price — Bosch Serie 2 – 4 appliances.
appliances: Bosch Serie 4 Built-in Oven (60×60 cm, black)
Bosch Serie 4 Electric Cooktop (60 cm, framed)
Bosch Serie 2 Glass Wall Hood (60 cm)
Bosch Serie 4 Freestanding Dishwasher (60 cm, white)

bundles.label: Profi Package
bundles.positioning: Elevated standard for higher expectations — Bosch Serie 4 – 6 appliances.
appliances: Bosch Serie 6 Built-in Oven (60×60 cm, black)
Bosch Serie 6 Induction Cooktop (60 cm, framed)
Bosch Serie 4 Wall Hood (60 cm, clear glass)
Bosch Serie 4 Freestanding Fridge-Freezer (203×60 cm, metal look)
Bosch Serie 4 Freestanding Dishwasher (60 cm, brushed steel)

bundles.label: Top Feature Package
bundles.positioning: Highest standard — Bosch Serie 6 – 8 appliances, best energy efficiency, premium features.
appliances: Bosch Serie 8 Built-in Oven with microwave function (60×60 cm)
Bosch Serie 8 Induction Cooktop (80 cm, framed, FlexInduction)
Bosch Serie 8 Glass Wall Hood (80 cm, Europe's quietest)
Bosch Serie 6 Freestanding Fridge-Freezer (203×60 cm, brushed steel)
Bosch Serie 8 Fully Integrated Dishwasher (60 cm, XXL)

always_included: Warranty for the full contract duration (Bosch Customer Service)
note: Deals above €100k total contract value must be escalated to human before offer is sent.
